in. When we follow up with the opt-ins, we
will be sending them back to your affiliate
link, so this is definitely a matter of
"first opt-in wins." 

That means you are going to want to mail
early and often.

Remember, the commission is $600. We have
also put together a really sweet JV contest,
with a truly shocking first prize. More
details on that will be coming soon.

Finally, launch date is only one week away...
on Wednesday, October 18th. In other words,
this isn't going to be some super-long drawn
out launch, and we aren't going to be asking
you to mail for weeks on end.
